question: Performances performed in January 2016, at the Philharmonie de Paris
sparql:
PREFIX ecrm: <http://erlangen-crm.org/current/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?performance ?timeSpan ?label WHERE {
  ?performance ecrm:P4_has_time-span ?timeSpan .
  ?timeSpan rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER CONTAINS(?label, "2016-01")
} LIMIT 10
